name: Quick Fruit Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 1 t Orange or Lemon Peel, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart microwave-safe casserole, combine pie filling, orange or lemon peel, and ground nutmeg; stir.
2. Microwave on HIGH (100%) for 3-5 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes until hot.
3. Combine all remaining ingredients in a medium mixing bowl; beat until moistened.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto the hot fruit filling.
5. Continue microwaving on HIGH (100%) for 6-8 minutes or until no longer doughy.
6. Let stand on heat-proof countertop to cool slightly before serving warm with ice cream.
